entry.title: IDC W15P7T11DG402 (P00514) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS C4 SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: TECHNICAL INSERTION FOR DCG068 DCGS-A CROSS-DOMAIN SYSTEM SUITE (CDSS) WITHIN THE OTC.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: ALL OTHER MISCELLANEOUS ELECTRICAL EQUIPMENT AND COMPONENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W15P7T11DG402 (P00515) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS C4 SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: CONTRACT MODIFICATION FOR A TECHNICAL INSERTION (TI), P00515, TO ADD COMPUTER HARDWARE EQUIPMENT TO THE CONTRACT'S PRODUCT BASELINE UNDER YEAR 6&7 PRICING AND OPTION PERIODS 7.1, 7.2 AND 7.3.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: ALL OTHER MISCELLANEOUS ELECTRICAL EQUIPMENT AND COMPONENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W15P7T11DG402 (P00516) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS C4 SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS TECHNICAL INSERTION TO IS TO ADD THE CROSS DOMAIN SYSTEM SUITE (CDSS) HARDWARE WITH HPE DL160RS SERVER AND INTELLIPOWER UPS INTEGRATED WITHIN THE OTC, TO THE COMMON HARDWARE SYSTEMS (CHS-4) CONTRACT.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: ALL OTHER MISCELLANEOUS ELECTRICAL EQUIPMENT AND COMPONENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
